hero.desc: AInsekt Farm combines FLIK App marketplace, BSF + Cricket protein, BTC reserve, AI Compute Center, and quantum-ready blockchain into one self-reinforcing circular economy loop.
hero.subdesc: 50% energy → BTC HODL treasury · 50% energy → AI Compute B2B revenue · Heat from both → free farm heating

streams.label: Six Revenue Streams
streams.title: Zero waste.
streams.desc: Every element feeds every other. Self-reinforcing circular economy loop — the more waste FLIK collects, the more energy, the more protein, the more BTC, the more compute revenue.
streams.flikDesc: Global circular food marketplace — 5 user types, AI agent, Green Points, reservations, Zero Waste NFT
streams.bsfDesc: Black Soldier Fly 50% + Cuban Cricket 50% — EU Novel Food 2023 — 2,500–8,000 USD/t
streams.btcDesc: 50% energy → Bitcoin mining → HODL treasury forever — never sold — on-chain transparent
streams.aiDesc: 50% energy → GPU rental B2B — 40%+ CAGR market — stable monthly contracts
streams.heatDesc: Miners + AI servers → free farm heating → 50k–120k USD/year OPEX saved

energy.label: Energy Architecture
energy.title: One infrastructure.
energy.desc: PV 1MW + Biogas 200kW generate ~2,900 MWh/year. Split 50/50 between BTC mining and AI compute. Heat from both heats the farm for free.
energy.btcDesc: ~1,450 MWh/year → Bitcoin HODL treasury. Never sold. Transparent on-chain. Grows every day.
energy.aiDesc: ~1,450 MWh/year → GPU rental B2B. Monthly contracts. 40%+ CAGR market. Stable revenue.
energy.heatDesc: ~950 kW thermal recovered. BSF 28–32°C · Cricket 28–35°C · Both covered. 50k–120k USD/yr saved.

flik.label: FLIK App
flik.title: The circular food
flik.desc: FLIK connects biogas plants, supermarkets, farmers, individuals, and businesses in one platform. Too Good To Go reached 1.2B USD with only near-expiry food. FLIK does that and much more.
flik.subdesc: Live map · Smart countdown pricing · Reservation system · Green Points → AINS · Farmer Fresh marketplace · Zero Waste NFT · AI agent · Charity integration
flik.biogasDesc: Register capacity · real-time waste matching · monthly contracts
flik.supermarketsDesc: Near-expiry countdown · waste pickup · Zero Waste NFT certificate
flik.farmersDesc: Fresh produce direct · surplus listing · BSF frass orders
flik.individualsDesc: Buy discounted food · report waste · earn AINS tokens
flik.businessesDesc: Waste scheduling · bulk buy · CSRD ESG report on-chain
flik.mapDesc: Real-time pins for near-expiry products, waste pickup, biogas capacity, and farmer fresh stands. Updates every 5 minutes.
flik.countdownDesc: Automatic price drops: 48h=20% off · 24h=40% · 12h=60% · 6h=80% · Unsold → biogas automatically.
flik.gpDesc: Earn for every kg saved, waste reported, volunteer hour. Convert to AINS tokens or redeem for discounts.
flik.reservDesc: Reserve products 1–48h ahead. Monthly biogas contracts. SMS + push confirmation. Recurring farmer pickups.
flik.nftDesc: Monthly achievement cert for businesses. Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum. CSRD compliant. Marketing badge.
flik.agentDesc: Recipes for expiring food · CO2 impact calculator · ESG auto-reports · routing waste to optimal destination.

token.label: Token AINS
token.title: Utility token.
token.desc: 100M AINS fixed supply. Switzerland GmbH. FINMA DLT Act 2021. BTC reserve provides additional backing. Launch trigger: farm ARR ≥ 2M USD.
token.gpRewardsDesc: 1 AINS per kg waste saved · 10 AINS per volunteer hour · FLIK flywheel
token.stakingDesc: Quarterly: farm protein + FLIK App + AI Compute revenue distributed to stakers
token.btcDesc: On-chain verifiable treasury · additional value backing · never sold
token.daoDesc: Vote on expansion, treasury, FLIK development · 1 AINS = 1 vote
token.computeDesc: 15% off GPU rental when paying in AINS · drives organic token demand
token.discountDesc: 10–15% off BSF products, Cricket protein, frass fertiliser in AINS

roadmap.label: Roadmap
roadmap.title: Community first.
roadmap.p1Desc: App MVP · Flik daily content · Swiss GmbH registered · 5,000+ followers
roadmap.p2Desc: FLIK public · 10,000 active users · AINS whitelist · private sale
roadmap.p3Desc: Pre-sale rounds · Farm acquired · Construction · Miners + AI Compute
roadmap.p4Desc: BSF+Cricket full · AI Compute open · AINS launch · AgroAI testnet
roadmap.p5Desc: Series A · 10+ countries · AgroAI mainnet · Compute waitlist

contact.label: // Ready to talk?
contact.desc: AInsekt Farm is circular economy infrastructure at the intersection of agritech, AI, blockchain, and BTC reserve.
contact.subdesc: Pitch deck, financial model, and whitepaper available under NDA. Direct meetings preferred — Switzerland, Ukraine, or remote.
